articles.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
articles.content: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.

articles.title: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
articles.content: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn't fancy. Its 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and 1/100 shutter speed basically put it on par with a drugstore disposable. The fact […]
articles.titleZh: 柯达EC35是一款价格低廉的傻瓜胶片相机
articles.contentZh: 继其$ 99柯达品牌Snapic A1的成功之后， Reto Project将发布Kodak EC35 ，这是一款价格更实惠的35毫米胶片相机，售价仅为$ 34.99。EC35当然不是花哨的。它的25毫米亚克力镜头具有固定的f/10光圈和1/100的快门速度，基本上与药店的一次性相媲美。事实[…]
